description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> the caster's Health by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> of damage dealt.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 피해량의 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>만큼 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>회복</color>합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、ダメージの<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>回復</color>する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>恢复</color>相当于伤害量的<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Defense by <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、防御力が<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使防御力提升<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> when hit.\nDeals <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> of <color=#28d9ed>Max Health</color> as fixed damage to one target when attacking.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다.\n공격 시 대상 한명에게 <color=#28d9ed>최대 체력</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 고정 피해를 입힙니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nダメージを受けた時、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。\n攻撃時、対象単体に<color=#28d9ed>最大HP</color>の<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>の固定ダメージを与える。
description.zh:
(被动效果)
受到攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升
<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
攻击时,对1名目标造成相当于<color=#28d9ed>生命值上限</color><color=#28d9ed>5%</color>的固定伤害。
